title: calamintha fruticosa
intro: Calamintha fruticosa, also known as mountain mint or lesser calamint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects due to the presence of volatile oils and other compounds. The health benefits of Calamintha fruticosa include relief from digestive issues, sore throats, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to act as a natural remedy for skin irritations and wounds. Calamintha fruticosa can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
